seoTitle: How to Integrate Trello With Discord (Connect Guide)
metaDescription: Connect Trello to Discord using the Discord Notifications Power-Up so card updates, comments, and due dates stream into your server automatically.
intro: Linking Trello to Discord lets your team or community see board activity without switching apps. Using the Discord Notifications Power-Up, you can stream card moves, comments, and due-date alerts straight into a chosen text channel. This guide covers finding the Power-Up, authorizing both platforms, and choosing which events trigger a notification.

steps.heading: Open the Power-Ups marketplace
steps.body: From your Trello board, open the Power-Ups or Apps menu to launch the marketplace directory where you'll find the Discord integration.

steps.heading: Add the Discord Notifications Power-Up
steps.body: Search for the Discord Notifications tool, locate the official listing, and add it to your board.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Open the Power-Up's settings icon, select Authorize Account, and complete the Discord OAuth prompt by confirming your server admin credentials and allowing access.

steps.heading: Choose your server and channel
steps.body: Select the target Discord server and the specific text channel where you want Trello notifications to be posted.

steps.heading: Pick your alert triggers and test it
steps.body: Check the specific board events you want shared, like card created or card moved, save your settings, then move a card on Trello and confirm the notification appears in Discord.

faq.question: Can I choose exactly which Trello events get posted to Discord?
faq.answer: Yes, the Discord Notifications Power-Up lets you filter for specific events, like card creation or moves, so you don't flood the channel with every small update.

faq.question: Do Discord notifications link back to the Trello card?
faq.answer: Yes, the posted notification typically includes a link back to the original card so team members can jump straight to the details.

faq.question: Is the Discord Power-Up free to use?
faq.answer: The Discord Notifications Power-Up itself is generally free to add, though your Trello plan may limit how many Power-Ups you can enable per board.

faq.question: Do I need admin permissions on my Discord server to connect it?
faq.answer: Yes, you need admin-level permissions on the Discord server to authorize the connection and select a channel for notifications.
